facts.fact: The corpus consists of three Stripe product marketing pages scraped on 2026-06-04: Billing (stripe.com/billing), Checkout (stripe.com/checkout), and Payments (stripe.com/payments).
Stripe Billing unifies subscriptions and usage-based billing into one automated flow, supporting usage-based, tiered, flat-fee plus overage, and hybrid pricing models.
Stripe Billing's revenue recovery uses AI-powered tools (Smart Retries, card account updater, cancellation surveys), and businesses using Stripe recover 55% of failed payments on average.
Stripe Checkout offers four integration options—full-page hosted flow, embedded form, payment link, and Elements—each supporting one-time payments and subscriptions.
Stripe Checkout supports 30+ languages and 135+ currencies, and localizes pricing with Adaptive Pricing; early users saw up to a 46% increase in sales after enabling local payment methods.
Stripe Payments enables selling cross-border to 195+ countries across 135+ currencies, with access to 100+ payment methods, and has local acquiring coverage in 46 markets.
Link is Stripe's one-click checkout network that lets returning customers pay with a previously saved US bank account or credit card and check out in as little as six seconds.
Stripe reduces fraud and improves authorization rates using Stripe Radar and Authorization Boost, AI trained on billions of data points.
For complex usage-based or custom contract billing, Stripe points to Metronome (metronome.com) for real-time pricing, metering, billing, and reporting.
Stripe Terminal provides pre-certified in-person payment devices (e.g., Stripe Reader S700) supporting countertop to curbside use cases, with customizable splash screens and custom POS apps.
Gartner ranked Stripe as a Leader for ease of implementation in its 2025 billing Magic Quadrant.
The pages cite customer outcomes: Airwallet implemented a new subscription model in two weeks and increased revenue by 30%; Dines saw a 150% jump in revenue per venue with Terminal.

Supported payment methods listed include ACH Direct Debit, Alipay, Affirm, Afterpay/Clearpay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna, iDEAL, Przelewy24, SEPA Direct Debit, Stablecoins, WeChat Pay, OXXO, Konbini, and more.
